summary: On June 2, YKHC reports sixteen new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: GVEA’s Quarterly Fuel & Purchased Power Rate Change – Effective June 1, 2022
summary: GVEA’s Fuel and Purchased Power rate, which is updated quarterly, will increase by just over 1¢ on June 1.
